    Royals Hire Mike McFerran As Assistant Pitching Coach
    The Royals have hired Mike McFerran as an assistant pitching coach, the club announced.     Cold Stone Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu
    Cold Stone Creamery welcomes its 2025 holiday menu, which introduces two holiday-themed Creations and two holiday-inspired ice cream cakes. Here's what you'll find on this year's menu: - New Holiday Spice and Everything Nice Creation -  Frosted Gingerbread Ice Cream folded with ginger snaps, vanilla icing, and holiday sprinkles.  - S'more Moose Tracks, Please! Creation - Marshmallow Ice Cream made with Moose Tracks Fudge mixed with graham cracker pie crust, marshmallows, and more Moose Tracks Fudge. - Iced & Spiced Cake - Yellow cake, Frosted Gingerbread Ice Cream, ginger snaps, and holiday sprinkles, covered in white frosting.  - Layer on the Moose Tracks Fudge Cake - Devil's food cake and Marshmallow Ice Cream made with Moose Tracks Fudge, wrapped in white frosting. Cold Stone's 2025 holiday menu is available now for a limited time through January 6, 2026. Photo via Cold Stone Creamery. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Popeyes Debuts New Five Nights at Freddy's Menu
    Popeyes partners with the upcoming horror movie, Five Nights at Freddy's 2, to launch its new, limited-time Freddy Fazbear Crunch Menu at participating locations nationwide. Inspired by the Chuck E. Cheese-like Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria (where a bulk of the movie takes place), the new menu includes: - Freddy Fazbear Deluxe Box - Priced at $12.99 (may vary), the combo meal includes three classic or spicy fried chicken tenders topped with a garlic parmesan rub, served with new garlic-crusted Cheesy Bites, marinara dipping sauce, a new Cupcake Cup, and a fountain drink. - Freddy Fazbear Box - For $7.99 (may vary), the meal includes three classic or spicy fried chicken tenders topped with a garlic parmesan rub, served with garlic-crusted Cheesy Bites and marinara dipping sauce. - Cheesy Bites with Marinara Sauce ($3.99): Lightly breaded, garlic-crusted, and fried cheese curds made with white cheddar cheese. They're priced at $3.99 (may vary) and come with marinara sauce for dipping. - Cupcake Cup - Priced at $3.99 (may vary), it's a small strawberry-flavored cake topped with pink icing. In addition to the new menu, Popeyes has exclusive collectible sticker packs featuring the film's supernatural animatronics at select Popeyes restaurants nationwide in limited quantities. Photo via Popeyes. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )
    Little Caesars Offers $5.99 Large, Two-Topping Pizza Deal
    Little Caesars is once again offering a limited-time, online-only deal where you can get a large, two-topping round pizza for $5.99 at participating locations nationwide. The deal is available when using the code "TOPTHIS" in most markets. The price is slightly higher at $6.99 in certain markets, including here in California, and a different code--"TOPTHIS1" needs to be entered instead. The large, two-topping pizza deal is limited to one discounted pizza per order. Prices vary, but a large, 2-topping pizza is normally about $10 at Little Caesars. Photo via Little Caesars. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    KFC Introduces New Gravy Flight
    KFC introduces its new Gravy Flight, featuring three flavors of gravy: Signature Brown, new White Peppercorn, and new Southwest Cheddar Gravy. The fast-food chain is also offering its Pot Pie for $4.99. The gravy trio is featured as part of this holiday season's Extra Crispy Festive Feast. Priced at $25, the family meal includes three 8-oz sides of gravy (one of each), eight pieces of Extra Crispy fried chicken, four buttermilk biscuits, and two large sides of mashed potatoes. You can also order an individual-sized Gravy Flight or purchase the gravies a la carte. There's also a Gravy Fest Tenders Box that includes three Original Recipe Tenders, a side of fries, a biscuit, the Gravy Flight for dipping, and a drink. Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Crumbl Bakes a Pie Menu Through November 26, 2025
    Ahead of Thanksgiving, Crumbl's limited-time weekly menu from November 24 through November 26, 2025, includes seven pies. Here's what the lineup looks like: - Pumpkin Cream Pie - A lightly spiced, whipped pumpkin cheesecake on a graham cracker crust, topped with spiced whipped cream and graham cracker crumbs. - French Silk Pie - A chilled chocolate mousse pie on a cookies & cream crust, and topped with whipped cream and chocolate curls. - Chocolate Peanut Butter Pie featuring Oreo x Reese's - A creamy peanut butter filling packed with Oreo cookie pieces and Reese's Peanut Butter Cups on an Oreo pie crust, topped with whipped cream, chopped Reese's Peanut Butter Cups, and Oreo cookie pieces.  - Biscoff Pie (pictured) - A Biscoff–infused cream cheese pie filling on a crunchy Biscoff crust, topped with smooth Biscoff spread, whipped cream, and a Biscoff cookie. - Cookies & Cream Pie - A chilled pie with a cookies & cream crust and cookies & cream filling, topped with whipped cream and crunchy cookie crumbs. - Raspberry Cream Pie - Cheesecake pie filling on a buttery graham crust, topped with house-made raspberry jam and whipped cream. - Brookie Pie - A warm brownie, cookie, and pie all rolled into one, the pie's crust is a semi-sweet chocolate chip cookie. Inside is a brownie topped with a scoop of vanilla bean mousse drizzled with semi-sweet chocolate. In addition to the pies, Crumbl offers a "Secret Menu" where each location selects a flavor to offer (including test flavors). You can find out what's available near you by checking the Crumbl mobile app or website. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )
    Whataburger Pours New Frosted Berry Whatafresher
    Whataburger is serving up the new Frosted Berry Whatafresher as a holiday beverage for this season. Available now for a limited time, the Frosted Berry Whatafresher features Hubert's Lemonade mixed with blackberry syrup and blueberry bursties (i.e., blueberry-flavored popping boba), crowned with soft whip topping. The new drink is the holiday/winter follow-up to this summer's Prickly Pear Raspberry Whatafresher. The Frosty Berry Whatafresher carries a suggested price of $3.69 for a 16-oz drink and $3.99 for a 20-oz drink Photo via Whataburger. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

  • Open

    McDonald's Reveals New Grinch Meal
    McDonald's celebrates the holidays this year with everyone's favorite humbug--The Grinch. Starting December 2, 2025, the new Grinch Meal will be available at participating McDonald's restaurants nationwide. Available for a limited time, the Grinch Meal features the US debut of Dill Pickle "Grinch Salt" McShaker Fries, which includes a packet of tangy dill pickle seasoning, an order of fries, and a McShaker bag to shake them in. The Grinch Salt McShaker Fries are accompanied by a medium drink and your choice of a Big Mac or 10-piece Chicken McNuggets. Also included with each meal is a pair of Grinch-themed socks decorated with messages from the Grinch. There are four collectible socks in all--each in a different color. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Little Caesars Bakes New Stuffed Crunch Crust Pizza
    Little Caesars debuts the new Stuffed Crunch Crust Pizza as a limited-time variant of its stuffed crust pizza. It's available now through the Little Caesars mobile app and website ahead of a national launch for everyone, starting November 24, 2025, including Hot-N-Ready availability from 4PM to 8PM. The Stuffed Crunch Crust Pizza features a toasted, cheese-stuffed crust brushed with buttery garlic flavor (the same as is found on the chain's Crazy Bread) and sprinkled with herbs and breadcrumbs. The new pizza is available topped with cheese or pepperoni for $9.49. For a limited time, Little Caesars is also offering its Stuffed Crazy Crust Pizza, an online-exclusive, stuffed-crust pepperoni pizza brushed with buttery-flavored garlic spread and sprinkled with Parmesan for $9.49. It's also available topped with just cheese. Photo via Little Caesars. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Taco Bell Serves Up New Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla
    Taco Bell launches the new Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla as its "reimagining" of a classic quesadilla. Available now for a limited time, the Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla features grilled marinated steak, a three-cheese blend, new roasted poblano peppers, and Spicy Ranch, rolled up in a warm, flour tortilla. It's available a la carte for a suggested price of $4.99. You can also get it as part of the $9 (may vary) Discovery Luxe Cravings Box, which includes a Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla, a Doritos Locos Tacos, a Crunchy Taco, Chips & Nacho Cheese Sauce, and a medium fountain drink. Photo via Taco Bell. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla Calories - 530 Fat - 28g (Saturated Fat - 14g) Sodium - 1280mg Carbs - 43g (Sugar - 5g) Protein - 26g Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Jack in the Box Introduces New Gremlins Midnight Meal and More
    Jack in the Box welcomes several limited-time menu items, including the new Gremlins Midnight Meal, to round out 2025. Inspired by the Gremlins movie, the Gremlins Midnight Meal costs $12 (may vary) and includes two Crispy Chicken Strips, two Tacos, Onion Rings, Halfsie Fries, new Midnight Sauce, a drink, and a Gremlins air freshener. The late-night meal is part of the series that the fast-food chain is calling its "Munch Better Deals," which are "crave-worthy combos for every appetite, time of day, and budget." There's also a $7 Brunchie Meal and a $10 Lunchie Meal. The Brunchie Meal includes a Breakfast Jack, hash brown, three French Toast Sticks with a maple syrup dip cup, and a small coffee.  The Lunchie Meal includes a choice of a Double Jr. Jumbo Jack Cheeseburger or Really Big Chicken Sandwich, plus 10 Tiny Tacos, seasoned curly fries, and a drink.  Other returning and new, limited-time menu items include: - New Midnight Chicken Sandwich - A crispy-fried chicken breast filet, pickles, and new Midnight Sauce, served on a toasted brioche bun. Midnight Sauce is a sweet and spicy sauce that features the flavor of maple syrup and the heat of chili peppers. - Classic and Nashville Hot Mozzarella Sticks - Breaded and fried mozzarella sticks available plain or tossed in Nashville Hot sauce. They're available in 4-piece and 6-piece orders. - Meat Lovers Croissant - A grilled sausage patty, grilled ham, hickory-smoked bacon, a fresh-cracked egg, and American cheese, served on a warm, buttery croissant. - 2 for $5 Sausage Croissants - Each sandwich features a grilled sausage patty, American cheese, and a fresh-cracked egg, served on a warm, buttery croissant. - New Midnight Snack Shake - A vanilla shake mixed with M&Ms, salty pretzel pieces, mini marshmallows, and crunchy graham cracker crumbles. The listed items are available now for a limited time through January 5, 2026, while supplies last. Photo via Jack in the Box. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )
    Sonic Offers Free Coca-Cola with Customizations with Purchase
    Sonic is offering a limited-time promotion for its mobile app users, where they can get a free Coca-Cola, Diet Coke, or Coke Zero Sugar in any size, along with unlimited free customizations with any purchase. They're calling it the "Free Coca-Cola Your Way." To take advantage of the deal, you'll need to pick the relevant offer in the "Deals" tab of the Sonic mobile app. Then, you choose your Coca-Cola and add any flavors and/or fruit to your liking. Available flavors include Cherry, Sweet Cream, Twisted Lime, Vanilla, Green Apple, Coconut, Blue Raspberry Flavor Bubbles Fruit options include strawberries, lemon, jalapenos, pickles, lime, and cherries. The only add-in not included is Nerds candy. The Free Coca-Cola Your Way offer can be used once daily through December 28, 2025. Photo via Sonic. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Domino's Debuts New Spicy Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza
    Domino's debuts the new Spicy Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza as the latest addition to its Specialty Pizza lineup. The pizza comes topped with grilled chicken breast, ranch, bacon, jalapenos, provolone, cheese made with mozzarella (AKA pizza cheese), and a drizzle of Buffalo sauce. The chain is also offering a new $9.99 mix-and-match deal on medium Specialty Pizzas, including the new Spicy Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza. Domino's offers 10 other Specialty Pizzas, including The People's Pizza-Deluxe (i.e., a "Supreme Pizza" at most other pizzerias), Philly Cheese Steak, Pacific Veggie, and more. The price on the mix-and-match deal may vary; it costs $10.99 per pizza here in Los Angeles. You can opt for Handmade Pan or Parmesan Stuffed Crust for an additional charge. Photo via Domino's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Wingstop Launches New Fiery Lime Flavor
    Wingstop introduces new Fiery Lime as its latest limited-time flavor for its various chicken offerings. The chain describes the new, spicy margarita-inspired flavor as "a dynamic blend of refreshing lime and bold chili lime seasoning." It rates three flames out of five on the Wingstop heat scale. Available nationwide for a limited time now, Fiery Lime can be ordered on any of Wingstop's wings, boneless wings, chicken sandwiches, and tenders. Photo via Wingstop. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Dunkin' Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu
    Dunkin' has unveiled its 2025 holiday menu, featuring new and returning festive drinks as well as seasonal food options. Here's what you'll find on the seasonal menu: - New Cookie Butter Cloud Latte - Espresso, milk, and cookie butter syrup (featuring notes of brown sugar and baked cookie flavor), served over ice, topped with Cookie Butter Cold Foam and cookie butter crumbles. It's an iced latte version of the Cookie Butter Cold Brew, which was introduced last year but is also available this year. - New Berry Sangria Refresher - Dunkin's first-ever holiday-themed Refresher consists of bright berry flavors mixed with your choice of green tea, black tea, lemonade, or sparkling water. - Peppermint Mocha Signature Latte - Espresso, milk, and peppermint mocha sauce, topped with whipped cream, …  ( 16 min )
    French Dip Returns to Firehouse Subs
    The French Dip sub is back at Firehouse Subs for a limited time. Firehouse French Dip features "premium cut" roast beef, caramelized onions, melted provolone, and Italian seasoning, served on a toasted garlic bread roll. A side of hot aus jus is included for dipping. Prices vary, but an 8-inch medium French Dip costs $14.99 at a location here in Los Angeles. Photo via Firehouse Subs. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Just under a year ago, the Royals and Reds made one of the first significant trades of the 2024-25 offseason when Kansas City acquired Jonathan India and Joey Wiemer in exchange for right-hander Brady Singer. The trade made plenty of sense at the time, as the Reds were in need of some reliability in their…  ( 10 min )

    Royals Select Ben Kudrna, Steven Zobac
    The Royals announced that they have selected right-handers Ben Kudrna and Steven Zobac to their 40-man roster. That protects both players from being selected in next month’s Rule 5 draft. Kansas City’s 40-man roster count climbs from 37 to 39. The 22-year-old Kudrna was a second-rounder back in 2021. He’s long ranked among the top…  ( 8 min )

  • Open

    Denny's 2025 Holiday Menu Arrives
    Denny's 2025 holiday menu has arrived, anchored by the returning Rudolph Pancakes, which are themed after Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer. The pancake is available on its own and as part of an Everyday Value Slam. An à la carte order of Rudolph Pancakes features two buttermilk pancakes arranged to make Rudolph's head decorated with turkey bacon antlers, whipped cream dollops, chocolate eyes, and a strawberry for Rudolph's red nose. The Rudolph Everyday Value Slam includes Rudolph Pancakes and two eggs. Prices vary, but the Slam is priced at $6.99 near me in the Los Angeles area, while the pancakes alone are $5. As a holiday promotion, Denny's Kids Eat Free deal is now available every day, from 4PM to 10PM, for a limited time. Under the terms of the offer, you can get a free Kids Meal with the purchase of each adult entree when dining in at participating locations nationwide. Other seasonal holiday items available now at Denny's include: - New Cinnamon Apple Crisp Pancake Slam - Two buttermilk pancakes cooked with cinnamon crumb topping, topped with warm apple crisp, salted caramel sauce, and powdered sugar. The pancakes are served with two eggs, hash browns, and two applewood-smoked bacon strips or two pork sausage links. - New Cold Brew Flavors - For a limited time, you can get cold brew coffee in three new seasonal flavors:  Salted Caramel - Cold brew mixed with milk and caramel syrup, poured over ice, and topped with whipped cream and caramel sauce. Peppermint Mocha - Cold brew mixed with milk and peppermint syrup, poured over ice, and topped with whipped cream and chocolate sauce. Sweet & Creamy - Cold brew mixed with milk and cane syrup, poured over ice. - New Peppermint Hot Chocolate - Hot chocolate mixed with peppermint syrup and topped with whipped cream. Photo via Denny's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Dutch Bros Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu
    Dutch Bros readies for the holidays with the release of its 2025 holiday menu, featuring new and returning seasonal drinks. This year's holiday menu is available now at all Dutch Bros locations for a limited time and includes: - New Mistletoe Rebel - Raspberry and pomegranate flavors mixed with the chain's signature Rebel energy drink, and decorated with a green glitter glaze. You can get it blended, iced, or as a lemonade (a non-caffeinated option). - New Holiday Cookie Freeze - Espresso, sweet cream, and vanilla, swirled with jingle sprinkles and finished with Soft Top and more jingle sprinkles. You can also get it as a shake or iced latte. - New Jingle Nog Latte - Espresso and holiday nog, topped with Soft Top and jingle sprinkles. - New Jingle Chai Nog - Chai and holiday nog, topped with Soft Top and jingle sprinkles. - Hazelnut Truffle Mocha - A hazelnut mocha topped with Soft Top and a caramel drizzle. You can get it iced, hot, or as a Freeze.  -  Candy Cane Mocha - Espresso, peppermint flavor, and chocolate milk, crowned with Soft Top and candy cane sprinkles. You can get it iced, hot, as a Freeze, as a cold brew, or as a hot cocoa.  This year's holiday drinks come in one of six holiday-themed cups. Iced holiday drinks also come with a limited-edition straw. Photo via Dutch Bros. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Krystal Introduces New Expanded Patty Melt Lineup
    Krystal builds upon its recently updated Classic Patty Melt with a new, limited-time expanded Patty Melt menu. Here's what the lineup looks like (with suggested prices listed): - Classic Patty Melt ($5.79; also available in a combo for $9.79) - A 3-ounce burger patty, caramelized onions, and melted American cheese served on grilled, buttery toast. - New Chipotle Patty Melt ($6.79; also available in a combo for $10.79) - A 3-ounce burger patty, caramelized onions, melted American cheese, jalapenos, and Hellmann's Chipotle Mayo, served on grilled, buttery toast. - New Bacon & Egg Patty Melt (available all day for $6.99; also available in a combo for $10.99) - Bacon, a fried egg, American cheese, caramelized onions, and a 3-oz burger patty, served on grilled, buttery toast. - New Chipotle Bacon & Egg Patty Melt (available all day for $7.29; also available in a combo for $11.29) - Bacon, a fried egg, American cheese, caramelized onions, a 3-oz burger patty, jalapeno, and Hellmann's Chipotle Mayo, served on grilled, buttery toast. The new Patty Melts are available now for a limited time through January 11, 2026, at participating Krystal locations chain-wide. Photo via Krystal. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Crumbl Bakes Banana Pudding and More Through November 22, 2025
    Crumbl's weekly rotation of cookies and other desserts includes Banana Pudding and more this week. Here's what's on deck at Crumbl for the week ending November 22, 2025 (I'm a bit surprised there isn't more of a Thanksgiving theme): - Banana Pudding - Layers of banana, vanilla pudding, and vanilla wafers, topped with whipped cream and vanilla wafer crumbs - Cookies & Creme Tres Leche Cake - A dark chocolate cake soaked in classic tres leches sauce, topped with whipped cream, and cookies & cream streusel. - Peanut Butter Cup Skillet Cookie featuring Reese's - A warm peanut butter cookie topped with peanut butter cup mousse, a drizzle of melted milk chocolate, and Reese's Peanut Butter Cup pieces. - Double Fudge Brownie Cookie - A warm brownie cookie topped with a chocolate glaze and brownie bites. - Blueberry Pancake Cookie - A warm blueberry pancake cookie topped with a blueberry buttermilk glaze and a dollop of buttercream. - Iced Oatmeal Cookie - A warm cinnamon oatmeal cookie covered in vanilla cream cheese glaze. - Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips. Crumbl also continues to offer a "Secret Menu," which is a cookie or other dessert chosen by each location. You can find what's being offered through the Crumbl website or mobile app. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
